# llms.txt for Digioverse
# Last updated: 2026-06-11

Digioverse is a UK web design and digital marketing agency based in Woking, Surrey.
Company: DIGIOVERSE LTD, Company Number 17236340.
Address: 1A North Rd, Woking GU21 5DS, UK.
Phone: +44 20 4615 5575.
Email: support@digioverse.com.
Website: https://digioverse.com

Services:
- Website Design: Custom business websites from £995. WordPress and React/Next.js.
- Web Development: Custom React and Next.js applications with headless CMS.
- SEO Services: Technical SEO, content strategy, link building. From £995/month.
- Google Ads Management: PPC campaigns for UK businesses.
- Meta Ads Management: Facebook and Instagram advertising.
- Local SEO: Google Business Profile optimisation.
- E-commerce: Shopify and WooCommerce development.
- SaaS Development: Custom software and product development.
- Branding & Identity: Logo design, brand guidelines, messaging.
- Website Maintenance: Ongoing support, updates, security.

Industries: Law firms, accountants, medical clinics, dental practices, real estate, construction, restaurants, ecommerce.

Pricing:
- Starter Website: £995 (5 pages)
- Business Website: £2,495 (10 pages)
- Ecommerce Website: £3,995
- Premium Website: £4,995
- SaaS & Custom: Contact for quote
- SEO: From £995/month
- Google Ads: From £1,495/month

Primary service area: United Kingdom
Office location: Woking, Surrey, England
